lemon_market_new_listings.description: The vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor cosmetic blemishes but no major damage. The interior is clean with light signs of use. The engine and transmission are in solid working order.
Fair condition.
This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor cosmetic wear, and the interior is well-maintained with light signs of use. It is mechanically sound and has received regular service.

Get ready to enjoy this fantastic vehicle that's in great overall condition! It has been well-maintained and remains a reliable, smooth-performing ride. While you'll find the typical minor signs of use expected for its age, it still looks wonderful and is ready to hit the road with confidence. A truly solid find for anyone seeking quality and value!

This vehicle is in good condition and has been consistently well-maintained. The exterior paint retains a beautiful shine, though you will notice a few minor stone chips on the front bumper and hood from normal highway driving. Inside, the cabin is clean and smoke-free, with only light wear visible on the driver’s seat bolster. Mechanically, the car is solid, having received regular oil changes and scheduled maintenance. It’s a reliable choice for anyone looking for a quality pre-owned vehicle that has been cared for properly.

This vehicle is in fair condition. It remains a functional daily driver, but it does show significant signs of wear and tear consistent with its age. Mechanically, the engine starts reliably and runs well, though there is a minor oil leak that should be monitored. The transmission shifts through all gears, but it is not as smooth as a newer model. Cosmetically, the exterior has several noticeable scratches and some minor dings, while the interior shows clear signs of use, including some staining on the upholstery and wear on the steering wheel. The air conditioning and heater are operational, but some of the dashboard buttons show signs of fading. This is a practical option for someone needing an affordable vehicle who is comfortable with a few cosmetic and minor mechanical imperfections.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical reliability and aesthetic refinement. This selection represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a balance of performance and value. Rigorously inspected to ensure it meets our exacting standards, this automobile offers a sophisticated driving experience with enduring appeal.

Hey everyone! 🚗 I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape, super reliable, and ready to hit the road with a new owner today. If you’re looking for a dependable car that still looks great and feels even better behind the wheel, this is the one for you! Feel free to reach out with any questions—I'd love to chat!

Offered is a mechanically sorted E46 M3 featuring the legendary S54B32 inline-six power plant. This high-revving engine utilizes individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing to provide an exceptionally linear power band up to its 8,000 RPM redline. Power is delivered through a precise Getrag six-speed manual gearbox to a variable M differential lock, ensuring optimal torque distribution. The chassis remains rigid, benefiting from a documented subframe reinforcement and a refreshed suspension geometry featuring updated bushings for sharpened turn-in response. While the exterior displays minor road-going patina, the drivetrain exhibits excellent compression and crisp gear synchronization. This is a driver-spec example that prioritizes mechanical integrity and visceral feedback, retaining the authentic analog performance characteristics that define the M-division's golden era.
Reliable used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Runs smooth.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of performance and comfort. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish with only minor road wear consistent with careful use. Inside, the cabin is clean and smoke-free, featuring well-preserved upholstery and fully functional electronics. Mechanically, the car is sound, having undergone regular service intervals to ensure a smooth, reliable driving experience. From the responsive handling to the quiet highway ride, this car has been treated with respect and is ready for its next owner. It comes with a complete service history and clear title, representing a solid investment for someone seeking a dependable, high-quality pre-owned vehicle.

We are pleased to present this distinguished vehicle, representing an exceptional balance of performance and long-term value. Meticulously maintained and showcasing a refined aesthetic, this model offers a confident driving experience supported by rigorous mechanical standards. An ideal acquisition for the discerning driver seeking a reliable, high-caliber automobile that maintains a commanding presence on the road.

This vehicle represents a sophisticated balance of performance and long-term reliability. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable mechanical order, it offers a premium driving experience for the discerning owner. Its consistent service history and preserved aesthetics ensure continued dependability and exceptional value.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that’s been really well-loved? This car is in wonderful shape and ready for its next adventure! It’s been super dependable for me, and I’ve taken great care of it, so it’s clean and runs like a dream. It’s the perfect balance of quality and value. Come take it for a spin—you’re going to love how it handles!

This driver-focused icon features the high-revving S54 inline-six engine, delivering linear power through individual throttle bodies and a precision-gated manual transmission. Mechanically sound and well-sorted, the vehicle has undergone critical preventive maintenance, including a reinforced rear subframe and comprehensive VANOS servicing. The chassis retains its signature balance thanks to refreshed suspension bushings and a functional limited-slip differential, ensuring optimal torque vectoring under load. Finished in a classic colorway, this example offers a visceral analog experience with a powerband that pulls aggressively to its 8,000 RPM redline.
Used car in good condition. Runs well. Clean interior. Well-maintained. Title in hand. Serious buyers only.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and utility, showing in a condition that reflects careful ownership. The exterior boasts a deep, lustrous finish with only the most minor signs of road use consistent with its age, while the alloy wheels remain free of curb rash. Inside, the cabin is a pristine environment; the premium leather seating shows minimal bolstering wear, and every tactile surface—from the steering wheel to the infotainment console—functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, this car is sound, having undergone regular scheduled maintenance with a comprehensive service history available. It offers a smooth, quiet ride with responsive handling and crisp gear shifts. Recent updates include a fresh set of high-performance tires and a complete fluid service, ensuring it is turn-key ready for its next owner. This is a reliable, high-quality example that delivers a premium driving experience without the new-car price tag.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive excellence, this vehicle has been curated for the discerning driver who prioritizes mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement. Demonstrating a consistent history of diligent maintenance, it offers a robust driving experience and an interior preserved with care. This represents an exceptional acquisition for those seeking a reliable, high-caliber vehicle at a competitive market valuation.

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a balance of performance and value. Meticulously maintained and subjected to a rigorous multi-point inspection, it exhibits a clean profile and consistent mechanical reliability. The interior remains in superior condition, reflecting careful ownership. This offering ensures a sophisticated driving experience without compromise, standing as a testament to engineering longevity and aesthetic preservation.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, she’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for all my weekend trips. You'll love how smooth it feels on the road! It's the perfect match for someone looking for a dependable car that still looks great and is ready for many more adventures. Come take it for a spin!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, utilizing six individual throttle bodies and high-pressure Double VANOS to deliver a linear power band up to its 8,000 RPM redline. The drivetrain is centered around a crisp Getrag 420G six-speed manual transmission and a factory-calibrated limited-slip differential. This example has been mechanically optimized with a reinforced rear subframe and upgraded Bilstein dampers to maintain chassis rigidity and cornering poise. Recently serviced with a focus on valve clearances and cooling system integrity, it remains a visceral, driver-centric machine with excellent throttle response and tactile feedback.
Well-maintained vehicle. Clean interior. Minor exterior wear. Runs well. Maintenance records available. Reliable daily driver.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between performance and practicality. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish with only minor road wear consistent with careful use, while the smoke-free interior features supple leather seating and a fully functional suite of modern amenities. Mechanically, it is in excellent health; I have strictly followed the manufacturer’s service schedule, recently completing a comprehensive fluid flush and brake inspection. The engine pulls smoothly, and the transmission shifts seamlessly, offering a quiet and confident ride. This car has been garage-kept and treated with the utmost care, making it a reliable and polished choice for its next owner.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, demonstrating a commitment to mechanical excellence and aesthetic preservation. Rigorously inspected to ensure reliable performance, this unit offers a refined driving experience complemented by a clean service history. An ideal acquisition for those seeking a dependable, high-caliber vehicle that maintains a distinguished presence on the road.
